original_statement: what was the total number of medals won by australia?
mutated_statement: what was the total number of things associated by that place?
mutation_analysis: Entity de-specification + Object generalization + Verb substitution: Specific country "australia" replaced by vague demonstrative "that place" | Specific noun "medals" generalized to "things" | Verb "won" substituted by semantically weaker "associated" (australia → that place | medals → things | won → associated)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中agent的执行痕迹可识别关键信息：critique（tree_and_critic）只指摘了select_column步骤错误但未指出问题本身模糊；在after_refine的chain中，agent直接给出推断“rank 7出现两次……因此总数为2”，并在thought里把“that place”解释为排名且把“things”解释为国家/奖牌。整个过程中没有出现任何诸如“ambiguous/不明/需澄清”之类的表述，也未向用户发问或请求更多信息。综上，agent没有识别到变异问题中的实体不明确、对象泛化与动词替换导致的歧义，而是直接按自己的假设完成了查询与回答，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
